summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Medikal animated pipeline visualization. All 8 core features are working perfectly including auto-advancing animations, clickable scene indicators, neural network visualization, Africa map hotspots, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with animated pipeline section
Pipeline displays all 5 stages correctly (Hospitals, Secure API, AI Engine, AMR Detection, Dashboard)
Scene indicators at bottom are clickable and functional
Neural network visualization displays in AI Model Activity panel on scene 3
Africa map shows 5 hotspots when on scene 4 (AMR Detection)
Live metrics panel shows all data: Predictions (12,847), Accuracy (96.2%), Alerts (3), Sites (45)
Auto-advancing animation works - scenes change every 5 seconds
Mobile responsive layout with single column design
